Construction Fence Banners # Construction Fence Banners ### Order Custom Construction Fence Banners ![Custom Construction Fence Banner | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/3b30629031fb4bd7b094fe118ed9f418.jpg) * [Product Overview](#b5cf9f0e-a273-4399-8fb1-6d5bc39a86bf) * [Material Option](#80485df4-4d08-46c4-9463-1c813f12adb4) * [Finishing Options](#71f948d6-5d8e-4822-829f-4a9b228cdc0d) * [Artwork Specs](#74410f77-f1a3-4ca2-be3d-d2f34ab1ebc8) * [Production Times](#8535c6c9-8c64-4646-875c-aace1ffec916) * [Payment Options](#e6ffec0a-cfe2-44d7-a297-903d76e5d2c8) **_Due to the latest shipping regulations, all mesh banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please [contact us](https://www.banners.com/quotes) to get a custom freight quote._** Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a banner that you’re proud to hang. That’s why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. [Our team includes seasoned graphic designers](https://www.banners.com/resources/working-with-graphic-designers) and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made banner! If something doesn’t meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority. We offer a wide selection of custom banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1’x1’ to 8’x50’ unlimited design options in our [online designer](https://www.banners.com/resources/how-to-use-online-designer), and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it. Get started on your order today. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our in-house customer support team.[](#common-usesCollapse) **Did we answer all your questions?** If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300), and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you. Looking for something more specific? [We can customize your order through a custom quote](https://www.banners.com/quotes)! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders. #### Banner Materials Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application. **Mesh Banners** Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions. #### Mesh Banner Finishing Options **Hems & Grommets** **Reinforced Hems** **Reinforced Corners** **Pole Pockets** ![Vinyl Banners Hems and Grommet Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedg
